---
title: "Basics of Machine Learning: tidymodels (todo)"
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

::: {.callout-note}
**Proposed chapter scope:** Core supervised ML workflow with `tidymodels`: train/test splits, cross-validation, model fitting, and evaluation. Given the limited number of compelling non-text SML use cases in social science, examples may lean toward text or image data — or this chapter introduces the framework with a simple tabular case before later chapters apply it to text. Link with statistics and difference between prediction and understanding is explicated.
:::
